stemHtml: The maximum range for a piston /propeller aircraft is obtained at…

options.a: V<sub>IMP</sub> at the lowest practical altitude at low RPM
options.b: V<sub>IMD</sub> at the most efficient altitude for the power units
options.c: V<sub>IMP</sub> at the most efficient altitude for the power units
options.d: V<sub>IMD</sub> at the lowest practical altitude at low RPM
